
❯ /model
  ⎿  Kept model as Opus 4.8

❯ /model
  ⎿  Set model to Sonnet 4.6 and saved as your default for new sessions
▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔
   Select model
   Switch between Claude models. Your pick becomes the default for new sessions. For
   other/previous model names, specify with --model.

     1. Default (recommended)  Opus 4.8 with 1M context · Best for everyday, complex tasks
     2. Opus ✔                 Opus 4.8 with 1M context · Best for everyday, complex tasks
     3. Sonnet                 Sonnet 4.6 · Efficient for routine tasks
   ❯ 4. Haiku                  Haiku 4.5 · Fastest for quick answers

   ○ Effort not supported for Haiku

   Enter to set as default · s to use this session only · Esc to cancel
